untranslatable_reason: This signal requires ranking stocks within a basket and tracking relative position changes (at least 2-position movement). This requires cross-sectional comparison logic and basket membership state that cannot be expressed using single-instrument indicators and simple operators. The signal needs: (1) ranking mechanism across multiple stocks, (2) basket membership tracking, (3) position delta calculation relative to peers. These capabilities are beyond the scope of single-instrument technical indicators.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_13 is a portfolio/basket rebalancing rule rather than a single-instrument trading signal. It requires: tracking a stock's rank within a performance basket, detecting when it moves out by ≥2 positions, and swapping it with the entering stock. This requires portfolio-level logic, not signal-level indicator conditions. Recommend implementing as custom portfolio rebalancing logic in backtest engine rather than signal rules.
